Name: Deployed Officer Cui
Desc: Active Skill: Bites and tears at the target enemy, dealing <color=#f0d12b>Physical DMG</color>. This skill can be consecutively triggered, up to 2 times.
Desc2: <color=#ffffff>Bangboo Chain Attack: Continuously bites and tears enemies in front, dealing massive <color=#f0d12b>Physical DMG</color>.</color>
